nasb.text: and the sockets of the court all around and the sockets of the gate of the court, and all the pegs of the tabernacle and all the pegs of the court all around.

esv.text: the bases around the court, and the bases of the gate of the court, all the pegs of the tabernacle, and all the pegs around the court.

cnv.text: 院子四周的柱座、院子門口的柱座、帳幕的一切釘子和院子四周的一切釘子。

ccb.text: 院子周围和院子入口带凹槽的底座以及圣幕、院子周围所有的橛子。
